steps.title: Identify the artist's explicit belief
steps.content: The speaker directly quotes the artist's conviction: “Fixed in immortal marble is my fame!” combined with “surely this shall last!” These lines reveal precisely what the artist thought would result from his sculpture.

steps.title: Connect the belief to the answer
steps.content:
Choice C states that the sculpture would bring enduring fame by withstanding time.

The other options either credit technical mastery (A), assume restoration would occur (B), or claim comparative superiority (D) — none of which the artist's thoughts support.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
